provenance.source: HUD USER — U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development
provenance.dataset: USPS ZIP Code Crosswalk — ZIP to ZCTA
provenance.notes: GEOGRAPHY JOIN ONLY. Not Fair Market Rent, Income Limits, CHAS, or NCWM. Manual one-time download; no API key. Populate `rows` and set manual_download_required=false before Task D (Marin) / Task G (national) reconciliation. Row schema: { zip, zcta, county_fips, res_ratio }.
